executive_summary: Use claim-level support rate and a three-context ablation.

verified_findings.text: Claim-level support rate is a minimal metric.

inferred_findings.text: Offline evaluation fits a single-machine constraint.

proposed_method: Segment claims, label support, and compare context conditions.
experiment_plan: Run at least 30 cited QA samples across three context conditions.
limitations: Synthetic fixture evidence is not a real research conclusion
